entity.summary: Self-custodial multichain decentralized exchange platform offering order-book perpetual contracts, spot swaps, vaults, prediction and stock-linked contracts, and unified cross-chain deposits through the ApeX Omni product suite.
entity.notes: HEI models ApeX Protocol, ApeX Omni, Omni Perps, spot swap, vault, prediction, stock-contract, and API surfaces as one current exchange entity. The first-party roadmap states that ApeX Pro was sunset in 2025 while ApeX Omni remains the current platform; no separate active ApeX Pro entity is created by this record.

evidence.title: ApeX decentralized exchange and ApeX Omni platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform identifies ApeX Omni as the active multichain DEX product and exposes perpetual, spot, vault, staking, prediction, and stock-linked trading surfaces with self-custody and zk-proof settlement claims.

evidence.title: ApeX Omni protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol metrics report current non-zero TVL, perpetual trading volume, fees, revenue, and open interest for ApeX Omni, corroborating active exchange operation.
